meaning: n.国际日期变更线,日界线,日期栏
examples: On letterhead stationery, the dateline is simply made up of the date of writing.
The stories of newsmen on the scene have been wrapped up under a Paris dateline.
Then I saw the dateline — 1924. The letter had been written almost sixty years ago.
Instead, there will be Dateline-style reports about the VEVO tent streaming the Super Bowl at Sundance.
Gaspin expects two nights of scripted programs along with one reality show, some Dateline hours and repeats.
